## Checklist

- [ ] I've read the [contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)

- [ ] I've added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if this affects a published package
- [ ] All checks pass (`pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build`)
